name: Avocado Mousse
recipeInstructions:
1. Dissolve the unflavored gelatin in 2 tablespoons of cold water.
2. In a separate bowl, dissolve the lime-flavored gelatin in 2 cups of hot water.
3. Add the dissolved unflavored gelatin to the lime-flavored gelatin mixture.
4. Chill until slightly thickened.
5. Fold in mashed avocado, mayonnaise, and whipped cream into the chilled mixture.
6. Spoon the mousse into a 4-cup mold and chill until firm.
